app.name: Spotify Wii U
app.short_description: Unofficial Spotify Connect client for Nintendo Wii U
app.long_description:
An unofficial Spotify Connect client for the Nintendo Wii U (Aroma homebrew). Requires a Spotify Premium account. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Spotify AB.
Features: - Spotify Connect — control playback from any Spotify app on your phone or PC - Full playlist context — skips and auto-advance work across entire playlists - Now Playing screen with album art, progress bar, and track info - Shuffle and repeat control (toggle on device or from any Spotify app) - Audio Crystalizer effect with adjustable strength - Spectrum visualizer - Supports GamePad, Wii Remote, and Pro Controller
GamePad controls: - Plus / Minus: Volume up / down - R / L: Next / Previous track - ZR / ZL: Seek forward / back 5 seconds - A: Play / Pause - X: Toggle shuffle - Y: Toggle repeat - D-Pad Up / Down: Crystalizer on / off - D-Pad Left / Right: Crystalizer strength - B: Show / hide controls overlay
Setup: 1. Install the Aroma homebrew environment on your Wii U 2. Get credentials using tools/make_creds.py (see README for instructions) 3. Copy spotify_saved_creds.bin to the root of the Wii U SD card 4. Launch from the Aroma Homebrew Launcher 5. Open Spotify on any device, select "Wii U" as your playback device
